heading: Retrieve an Online Archive Using the Atlas CLI
body:
To list all online archive for a cluster using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters onlineArchives list [options]

```

To return the details for the online archive you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters onlineArchives describe <archiveId> [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas clusters onlineArchives list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-onlineArchives-list) and
[atlas clusters onlineArchives describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-onlineArchives-describe).

Related Links

- [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

- [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)
